expert_rss.summary: U.S. Pacific Command joint forces, along with allied and partner forces, successfully carried out a live-fire sinking exercise during Valiant Shield 2026, targeting the decommissioned amphibious transport dock USS Juneau off the coast of Guam.

expert_rss.summary: The R/V Petrel, the maritime brainchild of the late Paul Allen, was purchased by the U.S. Navy in 2022 and rechristened in 2025.

expert_rss.title: In a first, Trump will travel aboard Qatari-donated Air Force One
expert_rss.summary: Trump will travel to North Dakota on Wednesday for the aircraft's inaugural presidential use over a week after its commissioning flights began.

expert_rss.title: The US Army goes into the breach — without soldiers
expert_rss.summary: The phrase “into the breach,” invokes one of the Army’s most deadly missions. Now, instead of sending soldiers, the Army is experimenting with drones.

expert_rss.summary: The USS Juneau was sent to the ocean floor during a multinational SINKEX exercise.

expert_rss.summary: Master Chief Petty Officer of the Coast Guard Frank Welch spearheaded a number of reforms for senior enlisted personnel.

expert_rss.summary: Armed with loitering munitions, SOCOM MC-130J gunships and other aircraft would be able to hunt targets deep inside enemy lines.
